prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `e0fb7511`.
codex_response:
Implemented `e0fb7511` end-to-end. The rule is: find every orthogonally connected black (`0`) component, recolor components of size `>1` to `8`, leave singleton `0`s unchanged, and keep all `1`s as-is. I used the summary hint because it matched all official examples, so no `notes.md` correction was needed.

The task package is [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e0fb7511/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e0fb7511/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e0fb7511/generator.py#L1). The generator stays on-family by keeping the official `13x13` format, using a white background with sparse black noise, placing many isolated singleton zeros plus `5-7` orthogonally separated target fragments, and drawing those fragments from the same kinds of small shapes seen in the training set: dominos, L-trominoes, and one larger `5/6/8`-cell blob. No new shared primitive was needed.

Verification and artifacts:
- Official verifier passed `4/4`: `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task e0fb7511`
- Build succeeded for `1000` examples: [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e0fb7511/task.json)
- Generated-example verification passed `1000/1000`: `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task e0fb7511`
- Preview outputs exist at [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e0fb7511/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e0fb7511/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e0fb7511/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/e0fb7511/previews/preview_03.png)
